name: bmai-landing

scripts.minify:js: npx --yes terser@5.34.1 js/main.js -c -m --comments false -o js/main.min.js && npx --yes terser@5.34.1 js/i18n.js -c -m --comments false -o js/i18n.min.js
scripts.build: npm run minify:css && npm run minify:js

description: Site estático da BMAI. HTML/CSS/JS puro, **sem build**.
